name: DataKit
absorption_note: FAILSAFE ARCHIVE_ONLY. Source repo is Python (pyproject.toml, hatchling, Python ≥3.10), not Rust as originally classified. Repo is self-declared DEPRECATED — ARCHIVE RECOMMENDED per its own README.md and TOMBSTONE.md. Per RATIONALIZATION_EXECUTION.md §2 line 76-80, the canonical DataKit target is phenotype-python-sdk/packages/data-kit/, which is already active and populated (Python db_kit, Rust phenotype-event-bus + phenotype-in-memory-store, Go go.work). The 143-line pre-alpha pipeline.py is out of scope for the storage/events SDK and is not migrated. No live dependents in fleet (grep-verified). Source GitHub repo to be archived via `gh repo archive KooshaPari/DataKit -y`. Local mirror at /Users/kooshapari/CodeProjects/Phenotype/repos/DataKit/ is preserved per standing rule (NOT deleted).
note: Audited 2026-07-17; failsafe ARCHIVE_ONLY triggered — original ABSORB target was based on stale metadata (wrong language, wrong workspace, repo already absorbed). See audits/absorption-justifications/DataKit-2026-07-17.md for full justification.
